problem: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue?
mechanism: Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor
hypothesis: Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor may resolve How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
